summary: A Fox News 'The Ingraham Angle' broadcast segment: host Laura Ingraham interviews DHS spokeswoman Tricia McLaughlin in a split-screen, with inset dashcam and B-roll of an officer at a vehicle (Chantilly, VA). It is a recorded TV news interview about ICE officers and doxxing, with chyrons and a news ticker, and no music. Chyrons read 'Tricia McLaughlin - DHS ASSISTANT SECRETARY', "DEMS' CONSTITUENTS: VIOLENT ILLEGALS", and 'CHANTILLY, VA FEBRUARY 4'; THE INGRAHAM ANGLE and FOX NEWS bugs are present.
notable_text: Chyrons: 'Tricia McLaughlin - DHS ASSISTANT SECRETARY'; "DEMS' CONSTITUENTS: VIOLENT ILLEGALS"; 'CHANTILLY, VA FEBRUARY 4'; THE INGRAHAM ANGLE / FOX NEWS bugs.
